label_policy.label_priority_explained: Only borough and airport anchors receive persistent labels. Unknown or unresolved lookup buckets remain unlabeled in the default braid and are explained through trace context when selected.

style_discipline.palette_check: Neutral charcoal background with role-coded teal, amber, orange, violet, and magenta data marks; not a one-hue dashboard palette.

detail_panel_policy.evidence_panel_role: Explains the selected OD-time strand through regime baselines, selected corridor medians, top measured zone strands, anomaly class counts, and capped real-row traces.

issues_found.issue: Initial browser run failed because the measured lookup bucket 'Unknown' had no schematic anchor.
Right evidence/trace pane was cramped at 1440x810.
The Unknown anchor label pushed global labels beyond the design budget.
Transparent corridor hit paths could intercept each other.

fixes_applied: Serialized missing credit-tip quantiles as JSON null rather than invalid NaN.
Added an explicit measured Unknown-region anchor while keeping it unlabeled by default.
Reallocated right-pane height and compacted the regime evidence SVG for 1440x810 readability.
Removed oversized transparent corridor hit paths so visible ribbons and anomaly sparks handle interaction directly.
Re-ran browser screenshots at 1920x1080 and 1440x810 with no console or page errors.
